---
title: "besgsdag_7"
subtitle: "`besgsdag_7`"
description: "besgsdag_7"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besgsdag_7/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                            | Title                         | Type   | Description                                                                                                           |
|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                         | The unique name of the event  | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                    |
| `center`                        | Research center               | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                 |
| `date_v7`                       | date_v7                       | date   | Date of visit. Visit 7.                                                                                               |
| `staff_initials_v7`             | staff_initials_v7             | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 7.                                     |
| `identified_name_cpr_v7`        | identified_name_cpr_v7        | string | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 7. |
| `relative_v7`                   | relative_v7                   | string | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 7.                                 |
| `relative_name_v7`              | relative_name_v7              | string | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 7.                                                                |
| `sens_download_phone_v7`        | sens_download_phone_v7        | string | Whether the participant has downloaded the SENS app to their phone. Visit 7.                                          |
| `sens_id_nr_v7`                 | sens_id_nr_v7                 | string | Identification of the SENS tracker. Visit 7.                                                                          |
| `sens_turned_on_v7`             | sens_turned_on_v7             | string | Indicates if tracker is turned on and time period for measuring registred in webapp. Visit 7.                         |
| `sens_applied_v7`               | sens_applied_v7               | string | Whether SENS device has been applied. Visit 7.                                                                        |
| `sens_notapplied_reason_v7`     | sens_notapplied_reason_v7     | string | Reason why the SENS accelerometer was not applied. Recorded by study staff. Visit 7.                                  |
| `sens_application_date_v7`      | sens_application_date_v7      | date   | Date of SENS application. Visit 7.                                                                                    |
| `sens_info_v7`                  | sens_info_v7                  | string | Whether the participant has received information about SENS. Visit 7.                                                 |
| `sens_patches_and_zip_given_v7` | sens_patches_and_zip_given_v7 | string | Indicates if participant has received zip bag with extra patches. Visit 7.                                            |
| `stool_kit_v7`                  | stool_kit_v7                  | string | Stool sample home collection kit handed out to participant. Visit 7.                                                  |
| `urine_kit_v7`                  | urine_kit_v7                  | string | Urine sample home collection kit handed out to participant. Visit 7.                                                  |

: Fields in the `besgsdag_7` resource.
